retroactive_note: Retroactive sidecar created 2026-04-29 to satisfy the new Tier 2.9 reasoning-sidecar policy. Crop itself was auto-drafted (commit 8b16012, fixed in badca21 + 3f37c80). Source-to-section confidence mapping reconstructed from the source table since the original drafter run pre-dated the sidecar requirement.

1_thailand_applicability.rationale: DOA production manual + JIRCAS Thai vegetable database + รักบ้านเกิด confirm cultivation across Thai regions

2_climate.rationale: NC State Extension provides general climate envelope; JIRCAS confirms Thailand-specific applicability

3_soil.rationale: pH range from NC State + Thai soil context from DOA

5_planting.rationale: DOA spacing trial + DOA production manual + Thai practical guide

6_care.rationale: General principles only; chemical fertilizer specifics omitted per SAFETY_POLICY

7_pests_diseases.rationale: Pest/disease data from DOA + KUKR (post-harvest leaf blight); downy mildew resistance from peer-reviewed PMC; chemical control specifics intentionally omitted

8_harvest.rationale: Thai sources agree on harvest timing and method

9_economics.rationale: General market context; ICAR Indian intercropping data explicitly flagged as not directly transferable to Thai market

10_thailand_notes.rationale: JIRCAS Thai context + บ้านและสวน red/white cultivar comparison + KU clgc botanical reference

11_foreign_knowledge.rationale: NC State Extension + PMC tulsi review + ICAR; foreign cultural/economic context flagged as not directly applicable

overall_rationale: Per the original Content Verifier run (2026-04-29), 9 high-confidence sources backed the core sections; 2 medium-confidence sources covered economics and foreign-knowledge framing. Verifier blockers: 0; medium issues: 0; minor issues: 1 (non-blocking). See docs/AUDIT_LOG.md 2026-04-29 holy-basil entry for the full pipeline run record.
